add.description: Add a subscriber to a list

delete.description: Delete a subscriber from a list

sendCampaign.description: Whether to send the campaign as well and not just create a draft. Default is false.

excludeListIds.description: Lists to exclude from your campaign. List IDs should be single or comma-separated.

excludeSegmentIds.description: Segments to exclude from your campaign. Segment IDs should be single or comma-separated.

listIds.description: List IDs should be single or comma-separated

plainText.description: The 'Plain text version' of your campaign

segmentIds.description: Segment IDs should be single or comma-separated

trackClicks.description: Whether to disable clicks tracking. Default is true.

trackOpens.description: Whether to disable opens tracking. Default is true.

gdpr.description: Whether you're signing up EU users in a GDPR compliant manner

hp.description: Include this 'honeypot' field to prevent spambots from signing up via this API call. When spambots fills in this field, this API call will exit, preventing them from signing up fake addresses to your form. This parameter is only supported in Sendy 3.0 onwards.

referrer.description: The URL where the user signed up from

silent.description: Set to "true" if your list is 'Double opt-in' but you want to bypass that and signup the user to the list as 'Single Opt-in instead' (optional)

listId.description: The list ID you want to subscribe a user to. This encrypted & hashed ID can be found under View all lists section named ID.
